arts.ttl: How Many Games Will Nicolas Jackson Miss For Chelsea With a Hamstring Injury?
arts.sum: Nicolas Jackson will be unavailable for Chelsea in their next five Premier League games as he's set to miss six to eight weeks.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca: Chelsea not the same as club that regularly competed for trophies
arts.sum: The Blues were two points behind leaders Liverpool on December 22 but have collected only nine points from eight games since.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca defends his comments after Chelsea's FA Cup defeat by Brighton and insists the Blues are a different club to the one that won a glut of major trophies
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL: Enzo Maresca defended the use of his cliché after being dumped out of the FA Cup by Brighton last weekend, saying Chelsea are now a different club to the one that used to win for fun.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca agrees with Chelsea fans despite major claim about £1bn squad
arts.sum: Chelsea were knocked out of the FA Cup by Brighton last weekend and they'll play the Seagulls once again on Friday, as Enzo Maresca's side return to Premier League action

arts.ttl: Chelsea: Enzo Maresca slams 'completely wrong' decision to make Blues play on deadline day
arts.sum: Chelsea had no time to react after losing Nicolas Jackson and Marc Guiu to injuries against West Ham

arts.ttl: Chelsea: Enzo Maresca sparks Fabian Hurzeler tension with bizarre answer before Brighton clash
arts.sum: Maresca on Friday takes Chelsea to the Amex for the second time in a week

arts.ttl: Inside Man United's very own civil war: Current stars embroiled in public spats with club legends, fans clash with Sir Jim Ratcliffe and Jadon Sancho mocks club by suggesting Marcus Rashford is now 'free' despite still being on payroll
arts.sum: Players are taking on criticism from pundits, fans are protesting against rises such as ticketing, while social media has whipped up a storm or two for comments left on sites such as Instagram.

arts.ttl: Maresca LOSES patience with star man as Chelsea struggle to solve €80m problem
arts.sum: And the same situation has manifested for Sanchez after a string of errors in recent weeks, with Maresca confirming that Filip Jorgensen would be his number one option going forward after starting in last weekend’s win over West Ham. The 22-year-old made just his third league start of the season against West Ham in Chelsea’s 2-1 win and Maresca has now confirmed he will continue to stand by Jorgensen for a sustained period of matches.

arts.ttl: 'I know': What Pep Guardiola once said about Raheem Sterling playing as a striker is now very interesting
Amorim rivals Chelsea, Arsenal and Man City for BIG MONEY wonderkids: Man Utd Transfer News Today
arts.sum: All the latest transfer news, gossip and rumours from Manchester United as Ruben Amorim looks to battle some of his Premier League rivals to sign a striker and a €90m star. Man Utd dealt HUGE financial blow over summer transfer plans
